title: Boss Bars (1.9+)
description: Learn how to create and manage boss bars for displaying health, progress, or custom messages to players.

lessons.title: Creating a Basic Boss Bar
lessons.content:
## Introduction
Boss bars are progress bars displayed at the top of the screen. They can show health, timers, or custom messages.

### Example: Create and Display Boss Bar
```java
BossBar bar = Bukkit.createBossBar("§6Defeat the Dragon!", BarColor.RED, BarStyle.SOLID);
bar.addPlayer(player);
bar.setProgress(1.0); // Full bar
```

### Logic Explanation
- `createBossBar(String title, BarColor color, BarStyle style)` creates a new bar.
- `addPlayer(Player)` shows the bar to a player.
- `setProgress(double)` controls the fill (0.0 to 1.0).

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Boss bars only appear for players added via `addPlayer`.
- `setProgress` values outside 0.0-1.0 are clamped.
- Remove players when they leave to avoid memory leaks.

quiz.question: Which method displays the boss bar to a player?
What is the valid range for boss bar progress?

lessons.title: Updating Boss Bar Progress and Title

quiz.question: Which method changes the text displayed on a boss bar?
Why should you remove players from boss bars when done?
options: Prevent memory leaks and lingering bars

lessons.title: Boss Bar Colors & Styles
lessons.content:
## Introduction
Boss bars can have different colors and styles to match events or aesthetics.

### Example: Colored and Segmented Boss Bar
```java
BossBar bar = Bukkit.createBossBar("§aChallenge", BarColor.GREEN, BarStyle.SEGMENTED_10);
bar.addPlayer(player);
bar.setProgress(0.7);
```

### Logic Explanation
- `BarColor` options: RED, GREEN, BLUE, YELLOW, PURPLE, WHITE.
- `BarStyle` options: SOLID, SEGMENTED_6, SEGMENTED_10, SEGMENTED_12, SEGMENTED_20.
- Segmented bars show divisions, useful for HP or stages.

### Edge Cases & Warnings
- Segmented bars may not align with actual progress perfectly; calculate carefully.
- Colors are visual only; players may not interpret meaning without context.
- Keep boss bars relevant; too many can clutter the screen.

quiz.question: Which style shows a solid, continuous bar?
How many segments does SEGMENTED_10 have?
